name: power-sex-suicide
description: Nick Lane's Power, Sex, Suicide — understand how mitochondria shape the most profound aspects of life: cellular energy, the evolution of sex, aging, and programmed cell death (apoptosis)
useCase: Helps anyone understand the fundamental biology of mitochondria and their role in evolution, aging, sex, and disease — from cellular energy production to the origins of complex life.
knownRisks: This is a complex biology topic — the skill simplifies but users should expect depth
Mitochondrial health advice should complement, not replace, medical guidance
